description: In 2018, Sony faced a massive consumer backlash for refusing to enable cross-platform play for Fortnite between the PlayStation 4 and other consoles (Xbox/Switch). The company eventually relented after prolonged negative PR, marking a pivotal moment in gaming industry open-platform policy shifts.

key_events.description: Fortnite launches on Switch; Sony blocks account cross-progression.
Gaming influencers and media outlets lead widespread social media campaign against Sony.
Sony issues public statement citing 'protecting the ecosystem' (widely ridiculed).
Sony announces 'Beta' test for cross-play, capitulating to demand.

calibration_notes: Highlights how consumer pressure can force a monopoly to change restrictive policy.
